scripts.build:gh-pages: ng build --configuration production --base-href /flat-player/ && cp dist/flat-player/browser/index.html dist/flat-player/browser/404.html && touch dist/flat-player/browser/.nojekyll
scripts.build:wrapper: npm run build:tizen && npm run copy:wrapper
scripts.sdb:deploy: set -e && npm run build:wrapper && echo '[SDB] Instalando en TV...' && sdb install -r /Users/notblu/Documents/angular/flat-iptv-player/flatPlayerWrapper/flatPlayerWrapper.wgt && echo '[SDB] Lanzando app...' && sdb launch jBGSnDuP3t.flatPlayerWrapper
scripts.sdb:all: set -e && echo '[SDB] Deteniendo servidor...' && npm run sdb:kill && echo '[SDB] Iniciando servidor...' && npm run sdb:start && echo '[SDB] Conectando a TV...' && npm run sdb:connect && echo '[SDB] Desplegando app...' && npm run sdb:deploy && echo '[SDB] Despliegue completado'
scripts.release: npm run version:bump && git add -A && git commit -m 'release: v$npm_package_version' && git tag v$npm_package_version && git push && git push --tags
